commands.review_summary:
The PR adds doctor diagnostics and regression coverage for configured external Discord/channel plugins blocked by missing explicit plugin trust or restrictive `plugins.allow` settings.

PR surface: Source +209, Tests +1207. Total +1416 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source. Current main gates the blocker scanner on explicit plugin-disable config, so an installed external Discord plugin with channel config but missing explicit trust can miss the intended doctor warning; I did not run the CLI in this read-only review.
